support.modal.intro.community.message: Nothing Archive is a community-driven project. Keeping it up to date and relevant takes time, effort, and ongoing costs (where applicable). If you've benefited from the archive and would like to support it, your donation helps cover these costs and allows the project to keep growing.

support.modal.intro.optional.message: Donations are completely optional, and every contribution is sincerely appreciated. 💛

support.modal.intro.supporters.message: As a small thank-you, the supporters widget recognizes those who have made notable contributions. If you choose to support the project, your name can be featured there too.

support.modal.intro.thanks.message: Thank you for being part of the journey!

homepage.feature.devices.description.message: Explore the full catalog of Nothing and CMF devices, including phones, audio gear, wearables, and accessories.

homepage.feature.firmware.description.message: Download official Nothing OS firmware, stock factory images, and delta OTA updates to flash, downgrade, restore, root, or manually sideload updates on your phones to skip staggered regional rollouts.

homepage.feature.changelogs.description.message: Learn how software updates work on Nothing & CMF phones and browse official Nothing OS changelogs

homepage.feature.guides.description.message: Step-by-step instructions to unlock bootloaders, root, and customize Nothing and CMF devices.

homepage.feature.official.description.message: Find official Nothing apps, wallpapers, custom fonts, kernel sources, and developer tools.
homepage.feature.official.description.description: Homepage official resources feature card description

homepage.feature.apps.description.message: Explore custom apps, Glyph tools, and productivity utilities made by the community.
homepage.feature.apps.description.description: Homepage community apps feature card description

homepage.feature.projects.description.message: Browse creative software, tools, and custom projects built for the Nothing ecosystem.

homepage.feature.photography.description.message: Improve your photos with GCAM ports, custom configurations, and presets tuned for Nothing and CMF phones.

homepage.social.community.description: Label for the Nothing community link

homepage.tagline.message: A curated hub for everything related to the Nothing ecosystem.
